queries.question: List all of the medications for Mr. Smith and their common and serious side effects ?
queries.sql: select name, Common_Side_Effects.description,Serious_Side_Effects.description from Common_Side_Effects join Antibiotic on Antibiotic.commonSideEffects = Common_Side_Effects.sideEffectID join Prescription on Prescription.antibioticID = Antibiotic.antibioticID join Patient on Patient.patientID = Prescription.patientID join Serious_Side_Effects on Antibiotic.SeriousSideEffects = Serious_Side_Effects.SeriousSideEffectID where  Patient.lastName = 'Smith'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description ?description2 WHERE {
  ?common_side_effects a :Common_Side_Effects .
  ?antibiotic a :Antibiotic .
  ?antibiotic p:hasCommon_Side_Effects ?common_side_effects .
  ?prescription a :Prescriptions .
  ?prescription p:hasAntibiotic ?antibiotic .
  ?patient a :Patients .
  ?prescription p:hasPatient ?patient .
  ?serious_side_effects a :Serious_Side_Effects .
  ?antibiotic p:hasSerious_Side_Effects ?serious_side_effects .
  ?antibiotic p:name ?name .
  ?common_side_effects p:description ?description .
  ?serious_side_effects p:description ?description2 .
  ?patient p:lastName ?lastname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?lastname_f) = STR("Smith"))
}

queries.question: show me the description of the common side effects for the antibiotic Azithromycin
queries.sql: select description from Common_Side_Effects join Antibiotic on Antibiotic.commonSideEffects = Common_Side_Effects.sideEffectID where Antibiotic.name = 'Azithromycin'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?description WHERE {
  ?common_side_effects a :Common_Side_Effects .
  ?antibiotic a :Antibiotic .
  ?antibiotic p:hasCommon_Side_Effects ?common_side_effects .
  ?common_side_effects p:description ?description .
  ?antibiotic p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Azithromycin"))
}

queries.question: show me the descriptions of the common and serious side effects for the antibiotic Azithromycin
queries.sql: select Common_Side_Effects.description,Serious_Side_Effects.description from Common_Side_Effects join Antibiotic on Antibiotic.commonSideEffects = Common_Side_Effects.sideEffectID join Serious_Side_Effects on Antibiotic.SeriousSideEffects = Serious_Side_Effects.SeriousSideEffectID  where Antibiotic.name = 'Azithromycin'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?description ?description2 WHERE {
  ?common_side_effects a :Common_Side_Effects .
  ?antibiotic a :Antibiotic .
  ?antibiotic p:hasCommon_Side_Effects ?common_side_effects .
  ?serious_side_effects a :Serious_Side_Effects .
  ?antibiotic p:hasSerious_Side_Effects ?serious_side_effects .
  ?common_side_effects p:description ?description .
  ?serious_side_effects p:description ?description2 .
  ?antibiotic p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Azithromycin"))
}

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?name ?description ?description2 WHERE {
  ?common_side_effects a :Common_Side_Effects .
  ?antibiotic a :Antibiotic .
  ?antibiotic p:hasCommon_Side_Effects ?common_side_effects .
  ?prescription a :Prescriptions .
  ?prescription p:hasAntibiotic ?antibiotic .
  ?patient a :Patients .
  ?prescription p:hasPatient ?patient .
  ?serious_side_effects a :Serious_Side_Effects .
  ?antibiotic p:hasSerious_Side_Effects ?serious_side_effects .
  ?antibiotic p:name ?name .
  ?common_side_effects p:description ?description .
  ?serious_side_effects p:description ?description2 .
  ?patient p:lastName ?lastname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?lastname_f) = STR("Smith"))
} }
  component: { SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?serious_side_effects a :Serious_Side_Effects .
  ?antibiotic a :Antibiotic .
  ?antibiotic p:hasSerious_Side_Effects ?serious_side_effects .
  ?prescription a :Prescriptions .
  ?prescription p:hasAntibiotic ?antibiotic .
  ?patient a :Patients .
  ?prescription p:hasPatient ?patient .
  ?antibiotic p:name ?name .
  ?serious_side_effects p:description ?description .
  ?patient p:lastName ?lastname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?lastname_f) = STR("Smith"))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?common_side_effects a :Common_Side_Effects .
  ?antibiotic a :Antibiotic .
  ?antibiotic p:hasCommon_Side_Effects ?common_side_effects .
  ?prescription a :Prescriptions .
  ?prescription p:hasAntibiotic ?antibiotic .
  ?patient a :Patients .
  ?prescription p:hasPatient ?patient .
  ?antibiotic p:name ?name .
  ?common_side_effects p:description ?description .
  ?patient p:lastName ?lastname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?lastname_f) = STR("Smith"))
} }
}
